series_metadata.series_description: The purpose of this record series is to give reference to accidents that involve OPDC agency cars, proof of ownership, and persons assigned to individual vehicles. This record series consists of forms ADM-4702 (REV 2/78) preliminary reports, MVOS-39A (RE

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released, then destroy, provided no federal funds are involved. If federal funds are involved, retain for three (3) additional years, then destroy., Paper: Shred
